name: Plundering Shipwreck at %LOCATION_NAME
description: Great treasures can be found beneath the waves, sealed away during one of the past ages, either by a civilisation long gone or by some darker power, dying and seeking to lay the seeds of its return. %PERSON_NAME has stumbled upon such a treasure.

choices.name: A gift from the past
choices.description: %PERSON_NAME has found an artifact level item
